step1.title: Start with a clear, front-facing photo.
step1.subtitle: Soft lighting, no glasses, brows fully visible. Your photo is used only to render your preview and is auto-deleted shortly after.
tips: Pull hair back from the brow line
JPG or PNG, up to 10 MB

step2.title: Choose your brow look
step2.subtitle: {shown} of {total} curated styles · tap one to preview on your photo

step3.drag_hint: Drag the divider to compare before & after.

variation.title: Try a variation
variation.subtitle: Adjust intensity to refine the result.

reference.title: Want a real-world result?
reference.body: Use this look as a reference at your next salon visit. We'll generate a printable card.

studio.title: AI Brow Tint Studio
studio.subtitle: Upload a photo, pick a look, and see the result side-by-side.

left.photo_drop_sub: or click to browse — JPG or PNG, up to 10 MB

right.empty_title: Pick a look to start your preview
right.empty_subtitle: Tap any style below — we'll show it on your photo once you upload one.
right.empty_style_picked_subtitle: Drop a photo on the left to render this look in seconds.
right.empty_photo_only: Now choose a brow look from the left →
right.ready_subtitle: Tap Generate to render your new look.
right.generating_subtitle: Mapping {style} to your features · usually 8 to 15 seconds.
right.failed_subtitle: Something went wrong. Try again or pick a different photo.
right.success_orphan: Result ready — re-upload your photo to compare side-by-side.

drawer.title: All brow tint styles
drawer.subtitle: Tap a tile to preview, then apply your pick.
drawer.search: Search by name, shade, or shape...
drawer.select_hint: Tap a tile to preview your look.

errors.moderation_denied: This look can't be generated for your photo. Please try a different style.
errors.moderation_unavailable: Safety check unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
